text.p: Kindly submit your questions for the 2007/2008 Rain Semester examinations to the Head of Department before Tuesday, 16th September, 2008 for moderation. Please keep a soft copy of the questions to facilitate corrections after the moderation.
Please, submit also your coursework Grade and Attendance Register for SER 001 by September 22nd, 2008, The information should be provided on the Template of the course circulated earlier to staff.
